content.en:
Soon.

The Spirit Eye Realm Lord asked his subordinates to take the origin of the extradimensional realm, and these origins were all traces, but they were enough for tracking.

"Tianjiao Realm Lord, the origin has been brought!"

Spirit Eye Realm Lord Dao.

The Tianjiao Realm Lord took these origin powers and took out the Mixed Yuan Tianyang Disk again.

Rumble!!!!!

The Mixed Yuan Tianyang Disk absorbed these origin powers, and the Tianjiao Realm Lord used the power of the super-dimensional rules to urge the Chaoyuan Tianyang Disk, and began to deduce and track those super-dimensional origin beads.

In an instant, the power of the Mixed Yuan Tianyang Disk radiated to many surrounding territories.

Unless the other party escapes to an extremely distant territory or a place that contains the power of the third realm, they will not be able to escape the tracking of the Chaoyuan Tianyang Disk~.

The seconds passed.

After a long time, the Heaven-Horn Realm Lord frowned.

"Can't find it!"

The Tianjiao Realm Lord stopped urging the Mixed Yuan Tianyang Disk and sighed: "Failed, the other party is afraid that he has already refined all those extra-dimensional origin beads, or he is protected by the power of the third realm super-dimensional realm." "

"This ......"

The Spirit Eye Realm Lord didn't know what to say.

In either case, they won't be able to track the enemy's tracks.

It can be said that they are determined to suffer this loss, and their faces are also lost.

"It's not that there is no way, just choose a random force, just say that they did it, and destroy it!" said the Tianjiao Realm Lord.

"It's also a solution, so that the face can be saved. "

The Spirit Eye Realm Lord replied.

"In the future, send a half-step extradimensional realm to guard those extradimensional realms, and keep rotating," the Tianjiao Realm Lord ordered.

"Yes!"

The Spirit Eye Realm Lord replied.

......

Soon after, the Celestial Horn Pavilion destroyed a small force with several half-step extradimensional realms, publicizing that this force dared to plunder their extradimensional origin beads.

The outside world didn't understand the situation at all, so they naturally believed it.

Only Ye Tian knew what the truth was.

"I didn't expect Tianjiao Pavilion to casually destroy a force in order to save their face!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

However, he was also relieved, saying that Tianjiao Pavilion had not found him.

Otherwise, he wouldn't be able to keep these extradimensional origin beads, and he would even affect the human race.

"In the future, I still have to do less of this kind of thing, otherwise I really encounter some terrible force, and the other party can deduce it to me, then it will be troublesome!"

Ye Tian stayed in the ruins and continued to refine the Extradimensional Origin Bead.

This time, he had obtained enough extradimensional origin beads, and the superdimensional body was already very close to 100% refining.

Ninety-eight percent!

Ninety-nine percent!

Ye Tian tempered with all his strength, and his mood was extremely excited.

Finally this day.

Rumble!!!!!

The extradimensional body has been thoroughly tempered and has reached a hundred percent level.

His physical body began to transform, frantically absorbing the energy around him.

And he had already prepared all kinds of resources, and kept swallowing them into his stomach to refine, so that he could successfully advance to the extradimensional realm.

At the same time, his extradimensional Dao species also began to transform.

It was only after a long time that he truly completed his breakthrough and became a first-realm extradimensional realm.

"The physical body is a hundred times stronger than in the past, this is the real extradimensional body, with my current strength, I can easily kill a group of past selves. "

In the past, no matter how strong he was, he was only invincible in the half-step extradimensional realm, but he was far from being able to match the extradimensional realm.

Now, he has broken through to the extradimensional realm, and only then does he know that the extradimensional realm is truly powerful.

"I've got to go to the Six-Winged Family. "

This matter cannot be delayed, otherwise it will be troublesome when the Six-Winged Family arrives at the 7362nd Territory and surveys the Extradimensional Origin Pearl.

If you go in advance and buy the super-dimensional formation and super-dimensional origin bead in the origin, as long as you pay a little price, the six-winged family will still give face.

......

Six Thousand Territory.

The Six-Winged Family.

Ye Tian descended here as a transcendent realm and visited the Six-Winged Family.

Soon, one of the Six-Winged Family's extra-dimensional realms, the Xuanyi Realm Master, received Ye Tian. []

"Ye Tian has seen the Xuanyi Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian behaved very politely, after all, the other party was the extra-dimensional realm of the six-winged family, not to mention the super-dimensional realm of the first realm, even if it was the super-dimensional realm of the second realm, there was more than one, and he was not qualified to compete with the six-winged family.

"It turned out to be the Ye Tian Realm Lord, I don't know what happened to visit my Six-Winged Family?" The Xuanyi Realm Lord didn't look down on Ye Tian either, any extradimensional realm deserves respect, in case there is a big background behind it or if it is expected to achieve the second realm in the future, it is not easy to offend.

0 for flowers0

If any extradimensional realm is offended, the Six-Winged Family may not be able to maintain its strength today.

Ye Tian didn't go around in circles, and confessed: "Xuanyi Realm Lord, the main thing is that there is a superdimensional formation in the origin of the superdimensional realm where I am located, and there is a superdimensional origin bead in it, and I didn't know it was the Six-Winged Family at first. Now that I know, I want to buy that extradimensional formation. "

"Oh, that's true. "

The Lord of the Xuanyi Realm was also very surprised, the Six-Winged Family attacked the extra-dimensional realm, almost all of them were looking for those weak extra-dimensional realms, and the extra-dimensional realm was absorbed from the origin, after cultivating the super-dimensional origin beads, it was even more difficult to cultivate, and even the half-step extra-dimensional realm was difficult to be born!

However, if you go out from this extradimensional realm, it is not impossible to hope for the superdimensional realm in the future.

"Which extradimensional realm is it?"

The Xuanyi Realm Lord asked.

"Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory!" Ye Tian revealed, "I don't know what price it takes to make the Six-Winged Family give up this territory." "

"It turned out to be this territory, and I originally planned to go to this territory to collect the superdimensional origin beads in the near future, since the Ye Tian Realm Lord is here, then give the Ye Tian Realm Lord this face. With only one hundred billion Extradimensional Treasure Coins, we can give up that Extradimensional Realm!" said the Xuanyi Realm Lord.

100 billion super Weibao coins!

This price is very high, but the Six-Winged Family is already very powerful, even if it is 100 billion Super Dimensional Treasure Coins, it is nothing to them.

If you want the Six-Winged Family to give up an extradimensional realm, you have to pay this price.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Immediately, he took out 100 billion super dimensional treasure coins and handed them to the Xuanyi Realm Lord.

The Xuanyi Realm Lord gladly accepted it, and then ordered that from now on, he would not do anything against the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory.

And Ye Tian also left.

For the Six-Winged Family, this is just a small matter, but it will not deceive Ye Tian.

......

Eternal borders.

Ye Tian Yinian smashed the super-dimensional formation in the origin.

From this day forward, the origin of the eternal realm will no longer be drawn, and there will no longer be a situation in the death zone.
